title: hemitelia × elliottii
intro: Hemitelia × elliottii, also known as Elliott's polypore, is a species of fungus belonging to the family Hemiteliaceae. It is a type of polypore mushroom, characterized by its bright yellow to orange cap and white pores on the underside. The medicinal properties of Hemitelia × elliottii include its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues, often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion for consumption.
